drizzle-schema.rule: Drizzle table style mirrors agent-mcp: sqliteTable(...), text().primaryKey(), integer().notNull().default(...), index(...), .references(...). Lookup tables use a text PK (NOT a sql enum) so seed rows extend without a migration. JSON columns are text({ mode: 'json' }).

store-class.rule: Store classes mirror agent-mcp: constructor takes a BetterSQLite3Database, methods are thin Drizzle queries, errors are typed ToolError-style codes. CompositionStore.resolveComposition OWNS ordering + version-pin + context-condition evaluation; downstream consumers delegate to it.
